payload: Complete Step 1: Initialize pnpm monorepo. Directories exist but need package.json files for packages/db, packages/dto, apps/api, apps/admin-ui. Add tsconfig.json, oxlintrc.json, .gitignore. Verify pnpm install works. See implementation plan for dependencies.
pnpm install: pass, typecheck: pass, lint: pass, commit: a23cb18
Implement Step 2: Set up docker-compose.yml with Postgres 18 (port 5433) and Valkey (port 6380), plus .env and .env.example files per plan.md specification
docker-compose.yml created with Postgres 18 (port 5433) and Valkey 8 (port 6380), .env and .env.example created, compose config validated, commit: 922ca13

Task: Configure @scheduling/db with Drizzle v1 and core schema. Implement packages/db with: 1) drizzle.config.ts for Postgres connection, 2) src/schema/index.ts with all core tables (orgs, users, orgMemberships, locations, calendars, appointmentTypes, appointmentTypeCalendars, resources, appointmentTypeResources, clients, appointments, availabilityRules, availabilityOverrides, blockedTime, schedulingLimits, eventOutbox) using UUID7 defaults and timestamps pattern from design doc, 3) src/schema/auth.ts with BetterAuth tables (users, sessions, accounts, verifications), 4) src/index.ts exporting drizzle client, 5) src/test-utils.ts with PGLite test helpers. Follow patterns in .sop/planning/design/detailed-design.md and implementation-details.md. Use Postgres 18 native uuidv7() for IDs. Ensure typecheck passes.

typecheck: pass. Created drizzle.config.ts, src/schema/index.ts with 17 core tables (orgs, users, orgMemberships, locations, calendars, appointmentTypes, appointmentTypeCalendars, resources, appointmentTypeResources, clients, appointments, availabilityRules, availabilityOverrides, blockedTime, schedulingLimits, eventOutbox + auth tables), src/schema/auth.ts, src/index.ts with drizzle client, src/test-utils.ts with PGLite helpers
task-1769221636-b37b: Implement @scheduling/dto Zod schemas per plan Step 4. See .sop/planning/implementation/plan.md and packages/db/src/schema/index.ts for entity reference.
